content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.sharding
FILE: cosmos/memory/sharding.py (36 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Sharding Module - Distributed Memory Interface

Provides interfaces for sharded memory storage to support:
- Horizontal scaling
- Distributed memory shards
- Load balancing

CLASSES:
- Shardable(Protocol): Protocol for components that can be sharded.
  Methods: async def get_shard(self, key: str) -> str
- ShardManager: Manages distribution of keys across multiple shards.

Current implementation: Di
  Methods: def get_shard_id(self, key: str) -> int
  Methods: def get_shard_path(self, base_path: str, shard_id: int) -> str
